settings.editor: The Civil Engineering CEO video show features interviews with CEOs of leading civil engineering firms on important industry topics. They will discuss how they are approaching some of today’s challenges and opportunities including the talent shortage, the abundance of infrastructure work, the hybrid work environment, and more.

metadata._yoast_wpseo_metadesc: The Civil Engineering CEO will feature interviews with CEO's of leading civil engineering firms on important industry topics.
